boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Invoice INV-VAN-076 bills M-4/R4 and is distinct from PRIOR-VAN-076 (M-3/R3) per policy STD-VAN-076-P which requires milestone ID, release number, vendor, amount, and credit/reversal status distinction.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: Milestone register MS-VAN-076 lists M-3/R3 and M-4/R4 as separate billable releases, and policy STD-VAN-076-P confirms distinct milestone ID and release number satisfy completeness.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Milestone register MS-VAN-076 confirms M-3/R3 and M-4/R4 are separate billable releases. No timing, scope, authority, or dependency defects remain open.

final_answer: The action may proceed. Invoice INV-VAN-076 is distinct from PRIOR-VAN-076 because policy STD-VAN-076-P and milestone register MS-VAN-076 confirm M-4/R4 is a separate release from M-3/R3. The duplicate-looking invoice meets completeness requirements under source-boundary policy as the milestone ID and release number distinguish it from prior payment. All critical features preserved; source boundary closed before execution.
